description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a vibrant blue color. The front features a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of control knobs and a switch, typical of a Stratocaster-style design. The neck is a light wood, likely maple, with a matching headstock that has six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is solid blue with a single access plate near the bottom edge. The body is relatively thin, and the overall construction suggests a solid wood core with metal and plastic hardware. This guitar is designed for performance and is commonly seen in urban environments such as street performances, music venues, or garages.
description: A blue, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three pickups, and a maple neck with six inline tuners. The design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban music scenes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue body, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full maple neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thin body profile and the protruding neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue back, access plate, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the body and the straight alignment of the neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Six inline tuning pegs, elongated headstock, no visible logo
